Title: User login
Steps: As a user I want to log in so I can access my account
Expected Results: User can log in with valid credentials

Title: Password reset
Steps: As a user I want to reset my password so I can regain access if I forget it
Expected Results: User receives reset email and can set a new password

Title: Profile update
Steps: As a user I want to update my profile information
Expected Results: User can update name and email

Title: Account lockout
Steps: As a user I want my account to lock after 5 failed logins

Title: Email verification
Steps: As a user I want to verify my email
Expected Results: User receives verification email and can activate account
